# Per host 5m rate (process exec anomaly)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

Process-execution frequency / anomaly hunting — surface noisy or rare binaries per host. Per host 5m rate.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS | bin _time span = 5m | comp count() as execs by agent_hostname, _time | sort desc execs | limit 50
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 16). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
